E2-001.title: Implement multi-branch mode
E2-001.outcome: Multi-branch mode fully implemented: issues dir path resolution abstracted by config mode, orphan branch/worktree management, all op reads/writes routed through AppendAndCommit for branch isolation, materialize pipeline mode-aware, init supports --dual-branch flag, SingleBranchMode derived from config. AgentSkill for trls also shipped.

E2-001-T1.title: Abstract issues directory path resolution by config mode

E2-001-T2.title: Git worktree management for issues branch
E2-001-T2.outcome: Added orphan branch, worktree, and git config helpers in internal/git. Init command gained --dual-branch flag that creates _trellis orphan branch and .trellis worktree.

E2-001-T3.title: Route op reads/writes through abstracted path
E2-001-T3.outcome: All worker op writes now route through AppendAndCommit which handles branch isolation. CommitWorktreeOp added in git adapter. Integration test added for dual-branch op isolation.

E2-001-T4.title: Materialize pipeline accepts dynamic issues dir
E2-001-T4.outcome: Materialize engine SingleBranchMode now derived from appCtx.Mode instead of hardcoded true. WorktreePath added to Context. Pipeline reads ops from correct location based on mode.

E2-001-T5.title: Init command supports dual-branch mode flag
E2-001-T5.outcome: trls init --dual-branch creates orphan issues branch, sets up .trellis worktree, and writes config with Mode=dual-branch. Implemented in cmd/trellis/main.go.

E2-001-T6.title: SingleBranchMode flag derived from config
E2-001-T6.outcome: Materialize engine SingleBranchMode flag derived from appCtx.Mode via feat(mode) commit. In dual-branch mode, done does not auto-promote to merged.

E2-002.title: Branch isolation for worker operations
E2-002.outcome: Branch isolation for worker operations complete. All worker op writes (claim, note, heartbeat, transition, create, link, decision, reopen, merged) route through appendOp/AppendAndCommit. In dual-branch mode, each op is committed to the _trellis branch worktree. Fixed remaining ops.AppendOp call in claim.go scope-overlap path. All tests pass.

E2-003.title: Cross-branch merge detection and auto-transition
E2-003.outcome: Implemented trls sync command with BranchMergedInto git detection, internal/sync DetectMerges logic, cmd/trellis/sync.go command, and post-merge.sh.template hook. All tests pass.

E2-004.title: PR-based done-to-merged workflow
E2-004.outcome: PR-based done-to-merged workflow: IndexEntry Branch/PR fields, trls status awaiting-merge callout, trls merged done-state validation and --pr flag, full e2e test. All tests pass.

E3-001.title: Push/Sync Layer — remote sync for _trellis branch

E3-001-T2.title: Add Push and FetchAndRebase to git.Client

E3-001-T5.title: Wire push deps through command helpers

E3-003.title: Audit Log Viewer — trls log command

E3-004.title: Issue Assignment — trls assign/unassign + ready sort

E3-004-T10.title: trls assign and trls unassign commands

E3-004-T8.title: OpAssign type registration + schema + log.go OpAssign case

E3-T13.title: Final Integration — build, test, all commands registered
